dct_description_sm: Bar scale on map given in Milaria; 300 units [= 10.7 cm].
Latitudinal and longitudinal lines along margins.
Shows tent city, topography, waterways (including lakes), ships, sea monster.
Appears in Sanuto's Geografia dell'Africa, Venice, 1588.
